'''zhathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backhanded|backhanded]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backhanded|backhanded]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhathate|zhathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhathatesher|zhathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhathatesherĂ«m|zhathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhathatero|zhathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhathateshĂ«|zhathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhathateshĂ«m|zhathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhathatero|gokizhathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhathateshĂ«|gokizhathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhathateshĂ«m|gokizhathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhathankerom|gozhathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhathankeshĂ«|gozhathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhathankeshĂ«m|gozhathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhathankeya|gozhathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhathaterom|zhathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhathatemu|zhathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhathateya|zhathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhathaterom|gokizhathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhathatemu|gokizhathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhathateya|gokizhathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhathathate|zhathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhathathatesher|zhathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhathathatesherĂ«m|zhathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhathathatero|zhathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhathathateshĂ«|zhathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhathathateshĂ«m|zhathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhathathatero|gokizhathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhathathateshĂ«|gokizhathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhathathateshĂ«m|gokizhathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhathathankerom|gozhathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhathathankeshĂ«|gozhathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhathathankeshĂ«m|gozhathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhathathankeya|gozhathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhathathaterom|zhathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhathathatemu|zhathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhathathateya|zhathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhathathaterom|gokizhathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhathathatemu|gokizhathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhathathateya|gokizhathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠte|zhĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠtesher|zhĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠtero|zhĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠthĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠterom|zhĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠtemu|zhĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠthĂŠteya|zhĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠthĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠthĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafthafte|zhafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafthaftesher|zhafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafthaftesherĂ«m|zhafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafthaftero|zhafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafthafteshĂ«|zhafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafthafteshĂ«m|zhafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafthaftero|gokizhafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafthafteshĂ«|gokizhafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafthafteshĂ«m|gokizhafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafthafnkerom|gozhafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafthafnkeshĂ«|gozhafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafthafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafthafnkeya|gozhafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafthafterom|zhafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafthaftemu|zhafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafthafteya|zhafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafthafterom|gokizhafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafthaftemu|gokizhafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafthafteya|gokizhafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
